options.label: AWS
options.description: Amazon Web Services — mature, broad service catalog, high market share.

options.label: Google Cloud
options.description: Strong in AI/ML, competitive pricing, growing enterprise presence.

options.label: Azure
options.description: Microsoft Azure — strong enterprise integration, hybrid cloud, AI services.

comparison_goal: Which cloud provider best fits our needs for an AI workload with low latency, moderate budget, and strong ML tooling?
context: Our team has experience with Python and TensorFlow. We need GPU instances and managed Kubernetes.
